name: Tsutsumi Jewelry Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tsutsumi Jewelry Co.,Ltd. engages in manufacturing, wholesaling, and retailing jewelry primarily in Japan. It offers jewelry design, as well as reconditioning and repair of pre-owned jewelry. The company also operates precious stone trading centers in the United States, Belgium, Israel, India, and Thailand. It operates 173 specialty jewelry retail stores in Japan. The company was formerly known as Tsutsumi Precious Metals and Crafts Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tsutsumi Jewelry Co., Ltd. in April 1988. Tsutsumi Jewelry Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Warabi, Japan.
